title: Run Contract Schema
description: Schema for the target repo's .agent/contract.yml automation surface. This shape is derived from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1 "Repo Contract" and the Phase 0 contract example in IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md. Open question: canonical-architecture.md names required environment variables or templates, but it does not yet define any additional env metadata beyond required_vars and template.

version.description: Contract version number. The current examples in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1 and IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 0 use version 1.

stack.description: Supported stack or repo type declared by the repo contract, as required by canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

commands.description: Deterministic contract-defined commands and health mechanism for setup, verification, app launch, and UI smoke, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

setup.description: Required setup command from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1 "Minimum v1 required fields".

test.description: Required test command from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1 "Minimum v1 required fields".

app_up.description: Required app launch command from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1 "Minimum v1 required fields".

app_health.description: Required app health mechanism from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1. The examples use an HTTP health URL.

lint.description: Optional lint command named in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

typecheck.description: Optional typecheck command named in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

format.description: Optional format command named in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

app_down.description: Optional app shutdown command named in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

ui_smoke.description: Optional UI smoke command named in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

seed_testdata.description: Optional test-data seeding command named in canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

ui.description: Optional UI automation configuration from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1 and IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 3.1.

base_url.description: Base URL for app launch and UI verification, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

breakpoints.description: Viewport breakpoints for UI verification, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

critical_flows.description: Critical UI flows and assertions for deterministic UI verification, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

route.description: Route to verify for the critical flow, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

assertions.description: Human-readable deterministic assertions attached to the critical flow, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

env.description: Environment requirements and template hints from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

required_vars.description: Required environment variable names, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.

template.description: Environment template path, from canonical-architecture.md Section 8.1.
